Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x4EFD "STARTRADER-0400-4EFD" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Star Trader.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0400 which copies 256 bytes of data from $0420 down to $0000 so that the dump can start at $0400. This allows the game to run correctly.
